name: The Eliminator High Slide Obstacle Course
short_description: Multiple challenge zones with a dramatic high slide finish. Perfect for older kids.
long_description: The Eliminator is one of our most demanding and rewarding obstacle courses, with multiple challenge zones leading to a dramatic high slide finish. Popular with older children, teenage birthday parties, and corporate events. Great for communions, confirmations and summer camps across Galway City and County.

name: Army Boot Camp High Slide Obstacle Course
short_description: Military boot camp themed obstacle course with challenging sections and dramatic high slide.
long_description: Army Boot Camp is a military-themed obstacle course with tough challenges and a dramatic high slide. A hit with adventure-loving kids. Delivered, set up and collected across Galway City and County.

name: Crocodile Dundee High Slide Obstacle Course
short_description: One of our most popular courses. Great for birthdays, communions and school events.
long_description: Crocodile Dundee is consistently one of our top-booked obstacle courses across Galway. Colourful, engaging, and built for hours of fun. Suitable for kids of all ages, ideal for birthday parties, communions, confirmations and school events. Delivered and set up anywhere in Galway City or County.

name: Jaws The Shark High Slide Obstacle Course
short_description: 45ft x 12ft. Enter through the mouth, face obstacles and tunnels, then tackle the 8.5ft slide.
long_description: Jaws The Shark is a 45ft by 12ft obstacle course with a killer theme. Kids enter through the shark's mouth, work through tunnels, pop-ups and climbing walls, then finish with an 8.5ft slide. Brilliant for summer parties, BBQs and school events.

name: Disco Clubhouse Obstacle Course
short_description: Premium disco-themed course with bouncing area, tunnels and disco zone.
long_description: The Disco Clubhouse is our premium themed obstacle course, with a huge bouncing zone, disco area, tunnels and obstacles. Perfect for birthdays that want to go a bit bigger. One of our most booked hires for communions and confirmations.

name: Lizzy the Lizard High Slide Obstacle Course
short_description: Colourful lizard-themed course with challenging sections and high slide.
long_description: Lizzy the Lizard is a colourful, character-themed obstacle course with plenty of bouncing, climbing and a dramatic high slide. A firm favourite with customers year after year. Suitable for ages 5 and up.

name: Rainbow High Slide Obstacle Course
short_description: Bright rainbow-themed course with bouncing area, obstacles and high slide finish.
long_description: The Rainbow obstacle course is one of our brightest and most photogenic hires. A full bouncing and climbing experience ending in a dramatic high slide. Brilliant for birthdays, communions and garden parties. Photos go brilliantly on social media!

name: Army Combat High Slide Obstacle Course
short_description: Military-themed obstacle course. Brilliant for kids who love action.
long_description: Army Combat is a rugged, action-packed obstacle course with military camouflage theming. Great for adventure-loving kids and older parties. Includes tunnels, climbing sections and a high slide finish.

name: Nuclear Danger High Slide Obstacle Course
short_description: Action-packed course with tunnels, ramps, bouncing areas and high slide.
long_description: Nuclear Danger is a dramatic, action-themed obstacle course with tunnels, ramps, bouncing zones and a dramatic high slide. Built to keep kids busy for hours. A great hire for larger parties and school events.

name: Yellow Submarine High Slide Obstacle Course
short_description: Submarine-themed with slides, bish bash areas, tunnels and climbing walls.
long_description: Yellow Submarine is one of our most fun-themed obstacle courses, with bish bash pop-up sections, tunnels, climbing walls and a slide. Always gets a laugh at birthday parties.

name: Minnions High Slide Obstacle Course
short_description: Minions-themed course the kids absolutely love. Hours of bouncing fun.
long_description: The Minnions obstacle course is one of our most-requested hires for younger birthday parties. Colourful, bright, and absolutely packed with the characters the kids recognise. Hours of fun guaranteed.

name: Rockey the Tiger High Slide Obstacle Course
short_description: Tiger-themed course with multiple activity zones and high slide.
long_description: Rockey the Tiger is a bold, tiger-themed obstacle course with multiple activity zones, climbing sections and a high slide. Brilliant for a wide age range.

name: BOOSTER Adventure Run Obstacle Course
short_description: Fast-paced adventure run obstacle course. Perfect for younger kids and mid-size events.
long_description: The Booster Adventure Run is our mid-size obstacle course at a great price. Fast-paced, bright, and perfect for younger kids or smaller gardens where a full high slide unit won't fit.

name: ENERGY RUSH Obstacle Course
short_description: Compact course at a great price. Ideal for smaller gardens.
long_description: Energy Rush is a compact, energetic obstacle course at our best price point. Designed to fit smaller gardens while still giving kids plenty of space to run, climb and bounce.

name: CONGO The Gorilla High Slide
short_description: Dramatic gorilla-themed high slide. Perfect for older children.
long_description: CONGO The Gorilla is our signature high slide - a dramatic, eye-catching unit with a gorilla climbing the side. Unforgettable for birthday parties and communions. Suitable for older children who love a bit of height.

name: Bouncy Castle & Slide Combo Units
short_description: Spacious bounce area with slide. Paw Patrol, Peppa Pig, Princess, LOL Dolls, John Deere. Rain cover included.
long_description: Our combo units give you a spacious bouncing area plus a slide in one unit. Perfect for birthdays, communions and family parties. Themes available include Paw Patrol, Peppa Pig, Princess, LOL Dolls and John Deere. Rain cover included as standard, making these our most weather-resistant hire.
features: Paw Patrol / Peppa Pig / Princess / LOL Dolls / John Deere themes

name: Gazebo 4.5 Mtr x 3 Mtr
short_description: Compact gazebo for food areas or garden shade.
long_description: Our 4.5m x 3m gazebo is ideal for food and drinks areas, BBQs, and adding shade to an outdoor event. Pairs perfectly with any bouncy castle or obstacle course for a complete event setup.

name: PARTY MARQUEE 8x4 Mtr with White PVC
short_description: Weather backup and shade for outdoor events.
long_description: Our 8m x 4m party marquee with white PVC is ideal as weather cover or an event centrepiece. Keeps your party going regardless of Irish weather. Perfect for BBQs, garden parties, and as a dining or catering area.
